# Temporary Oracle Claim Comparison Export

This folder contains the temporary claim export and comparison artifacts for
`Pop Creations Flow 12112025 (1).png`, document ID
`9d09fa89-3a46-465e-a98b-837287c9e22a`.

It was committed only so another AI session can review the latest Oracle claims
without access to the local machine or production database.

Delete this folder from the repository after the macro-understanding analysis is
finished.
